name: capsule-crm
description: Reads Capsule CRM parties, opportunities, cases, tasks, users, tags, custom field definitions, teams, pipelines, milestones, lost reasons, task categories, boards, and stages, and writes party/opportunity/case/task create, update, and delete actions, through the Capsule v2 REST API.

risk.read: external Capsule CRM API read of CRM records and account configuration (tags, custom fields, pipelines)
risk.write: external mutation of live Capsule CRM parties, opportunities, cases, and tasks including irreversible deletes; approval required for every write action
